caption: A man with a tall, grey, textured hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders and a bow tie, along with over-ear headphones. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous framed photographs and clothing racks holding various garments. To his left, a microphone is positioned in the foreground, accompanied by a red and white logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, speaking and shifting his facial expressions slightly as he talks. The scene is static, with no movement of the camera or change in the environment, focusing solely on the man as he engages in a conversation for the podcast.
